briefs.title: BC Gaming Events Regulation sets new rules for licensed charity gaming events from April 2026
briefs.summary: A new BC regulation takes effect April 13, 2026, setting rules for organizations licensed to run gaming events (like charity raffles or casino nights). Board members and key officers cannot play in their own events, and events cannot be hosted in private homes.
briefs.action_required: Review your gaming event licence practices to ensure board members and officers are excluded from participating by April 13, 2026.

key_dates.label: BC Gaming Events Regulation takes effect — new participation and hosting rules
